source.price: Yahoo Finance / Stooq (~hourly, carry-forward on outage)

filings.ai_summary: Space Exploration Technologies Corp. is offering 555,555,555 shares of Class A common stock at $135.00 per share.
Space Exploration Technologies Corp. (SpaceX) is filing an S-1/A to register 555,555,555 shares of Class A common stock for its initial public offering at an expected price of $135.00 per share.
Space Exploration Technologies Corp. is filing an S-1/A to register shares of Class A common stock for its initial public offering.
Virgin Galactic redeemed $30.5 million of debt by issuing 6.7 million shares of common stock.
Virgin Galactic will redeem remaining debt by issuing stock, aiming to improve liquidity before commercial operations.
Micron Technology appointed Alexis Black Björlin as an independent director and member of the Governance and Sustainability Committee.

DTE Energy is issuing unsecured junior subordinated debentures maturing July 1 2058, paying a fixed rate until 2033 then resetting to 5‑year Treasury + spread (no lower than the initial rate), with optional interest deferrals up to 10 years and redemption rights at 100‑102% of principal.
DTE Energy will meet with investors on June 8, 2026, and is providing its slide presentation and 2026 operating earnings guidance.
DTE Energy will meet with investors May 17-19, 2026, and will discuss 2026 operating earnings guidance.
DTE Energy shareholders re-elected all directors, ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as auditors, and approved executive compensation at their May 7, 2026 annual meeting.
Adobe announced its Q2 2026 financial results and its CFO, Daniel Durn, is resigning.

filings.summary: Executive / board change; Shareholder vote results; Other material update

filings.ai_summary: Amazon closed the sale of C$13.967 billion in notes due 2029 through 2056.
Amazon is offering C$13.9 billion in notes with varying interest rates and maturity dates.

filings.summary: Material agreement signed; New debt obligation
filings.ai_summary: Amazon entered a $17.5 billion credit facility for general corporate purposes.
Amazon.com, Inc. is offering five series of Canadian dollar-denominated senior unsecured notes with varying interest rates and maturity dates for general corporate purposes.
Amazon.com held its May 20, 2026 annual shareholder meeting, re‑electing its board, ratifying Ernst & Young as auditor, and rejecting all listed shareholder proposals.
Reddit's stockholders elected directors, ratified KPMG as auditor, and approved executive compensation at their June 8, 2026 meeting.
Intuitive Machines Inc. held its annual stockholder meeting, electing directors and ratifying Grant Thornton LLP as its auditor.
Intuitive Machines entered a sales agreement to potentially sell up to $500 million of its common stock through various agents.
Intuitive Machines may sell up to $500 million of its Class A common stock through an "at the market" offering.
Marvell Technology's proxy supplement removes Daniel Durn as a director nominee due to his new CFO role.

filings.summary: Executive / board change; Other material update
filings.ai_summary: Marvell Technology's CFO resigned, and Daniel Durn was appointed as the new CFO with a significant compensation package.
Marvell Technology, Inc. reported net income of $34.5 million for the quarter ended May 2, 2026, driven by increased net revenue and recent acquisitions.
Marvell Technology, Inc. filed an 8-K to report its first quarter fiscal year 2027 financial results and announce a conference call.
Marvell Technology, Inc. filed additional proxy materials to inform shareholders about their upcoming 2026 annual meeting and how to vote on proposals.

This SEC DEF 14A filing is a definitive proxy statement from Marvell Technology, Inc. for its annual stockholder meeting on June 25, 2026, to elect directors, approve executive compensation, ratify auditors, and vote on a stockholder proposal.

filings.summary: Material agreement signed; Other material update
Unregistered share sale; Bylaw / charter change; Other material update

filing.summary: Bylaw / charter change; Shareholder vote results

filings.summary: Bylaw / charter change; Shareholder vote results
filings.ai_summary: Clear Secure, Inc. amended its charter to remove supermajority vote requirements and clarify officer exculpation.
Microsoft director Reid Hoffman will not seek re-election at the 2026 annual shareholder meeting, with no stated disagreement with management.
Microsoft appointed Carmine Di Sibio to its Board of Directors, effective May 13, 2026, to serve on the Audit and Compensation Committees.
Rocket Lab appointed Agostino Ricupati as Vice President, Corporate Controller, and Chief Accounting Officer.
Rocket Lab held its 2026 annual meeting, electing director Edward H. Frank, ratifying Deloitte, approving executive compensation, and authorizing a subsidiary merger.
Rocket Lab signed a $3 billion equity distribution agreement with numerous banks to sell common shares through forward and collared transactions, paying up to 2% commission on each sale.
Rocket Lab may sell up to $3 billion of common stock through designated agents and forward‑sale agreements, using the net proceeds for growth, acquisitions and working capital.
Rocket Lab’s 2026 annual meeting is on May 20, 2026, and shareholders of record must cast proxy votes on the board’s proposals before that date.

filings.summary: Unregistered share sale; Other material update

filings.ai_summary: AST SpaceMobile, Inc. reported a net loss of $191 million for Q1 2026, driven by increased operating expenses and a significant loss from a Block 2 BB7 satellite.
AST SpaceMobile, Inc. announced its first quarter 2026 financial results and provided a business update via press release and presentation.

filings.summary: Material agreement signed; Other material update

filings.ai_summary: NVIDIA's Q1 2027 revenue increased significantly to $81.6 billion from $44.1 billion in Q1 2026, with net income rising to $58.3 billion from $18.8 billion.
NVIDIA filed an 8-K on May 20, 2026, to announce its financial results for the quarter ended April 26, 2026.
NVIDIA's proxy statement announces its 2026 annual meeting and provides information for shareholders.
NVIDIA's 2026 Annual Meeting will address director elections, executive compensation, auditor ratification, and four stockholder proposals.
Robinhood Markets, Inc. stockholders re-elected directors, approved executive compensation, and ratified Ernst & Young LLP as their independent auditor at the 2026 Annual Meeting.

filings.summary: Material agreement signed; New debt obligation; Other material update

filings.ai_summary: Meta Platforms shareholders re-elected all twelve directors and ratified Ernst & Young as their auditor, while rejecting all twelve shareholder proposals.
Antero Midstream Corporation stockholders voted to elect directors, ratify auditors, approve executive compensation, and hold annual advisory votes on executive compensation.
Antero Midstream Corporation filed an 8-K to announce it posted an updated investor presentation on its website on May 12, 2026.

filings.ai_summary: AMD signed a five‑year, $5 billion revolving credit facility and raised its commercial‑paper limit to $5.5 billion, while shareholders approved an amendment to its 2023 equity‑incentive plan.
Energy Transfer LP's Co-CEO, Marshall S. McCrea, III, will retire by year-end, with accelerated equity awards and continued board service.

filings.summary: Executive / board change; Shareholder vote results
filings.ai_summary: ServiceNow’s 2026 annual meeting approved a 38 million‑share increase to its 2021 Equity Incentive Plan and elected six directors, while ratifying PwC as auditor.

filings.summary: Material agreement signed; New debt obligation; Other material update
filings.ai_summary: ServiceNow issued $4 billion of senior notes (rates 4.25%‑6.30% due 2028‑2056) on May 15 2026 under a new underwriting and indenture agreement.
ServiceNow’s May 2026 proxy asks shareholders to approve 38 million new equity‑incentive shares, re‑elect its board, and reject a written‑consent shareholder proposal.

Material agreement signed; New debt obligation

filings.ai_summary: Nebius Group N.V. filed its unaudited Q1 2025 and 2026 financial statements and operating review, incorporated into existing registration statements.
Nebius Group N.V. filed its unaudited Q1 2026 financial results and a letter to shareholders.
Gartner, Inc. held its 2026 Annual Meeting, where stockholders elected directors, approved executive compensation, and ratified KPMG as their accounting firm.
Intel's 2026 annual meeting saw election of all directors and approval of accounting firm, say‑on‑pay, and plan amendments, while three shareholder proposals were rejected.
